profile.name: Arslan Kazmi, MSc
profile.tagline: AI / ML Engineer — eval frameworks, finetuning & document AI
profile.blurb: Exploring data one model at a time. MSc Computer Science + AI, University of Guelph · Vector Institute Scholar. I build evaluation pipelines, finetune vision & language models, and ship them behind clean APIs.

projects.name: Receipt OCR
projects.description: VLM receipt OCR with a multi-model evaluation harness (Donut, Qwen2-VL, TrOCR, Claude), a Donut finetune, and a FastAPI service. WebDataset sharding scales it from 200 images to 550 GB.

projects.name: Document AI Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end Document AI pipeline for handwritten form extraction, with a human-in-the-loop feedback loop that turns corrections into better models.

projects.name: LangGraph Research Agent
projects.description: Multi-agent equity-research system with verification gates and citation tracking, built on LangGraph + Postgres + LangSmith and served via FastAPI.

projects.name: StarCraft II Player Skill Classification
projects.description: Classifies StarCraft II players by skill tier from gameplay telemetry — feature engineering and supervised modelling on behavioural data.

projects.name: FastAPI ML Template
projects.description: Production-ready FastAPI + ML template: versioned routers, per-version Swagger docs, uv dependency management, and Docker out of the box.

projects.name: Git Scrub — Visual History Explorer
projects.description: An interactive visual git-history explorer with sliders to scrub through commits — built entirely with Claude Code.

projects.name: ak-ai — Claude Code Skills & Tools
projects.description: Open-source Claude Code skills, agents, and AI tooling — reusable building blocks for agent-driven engineering.

projects.name: AI Poetry
projects.description: Poems written by AI models, presented in the namesake forms of the models that wrote them.

projects.name: jedi-council
projects.description: Multi-agent Jedi Council deliberation system — LangGraph + LangChain showcase (public/private deliberation, persona agents, retro RPG overlay)

projects.name: research-radar
projects.description: Conversational, multi-source ML research radar plugin for OpenClaw — LLM-judged relevance that learns from your in-chat 👍/👎
